branch_metadata.branch_rationale: System-R coefficient derivation / search-space audit; branch-blind algebraic test

description: Retarded-shell coefficients c_n that define the bounded operator T = sum_n c_n sum_{(i,j) in L_n^-} W_ij^(n) (|i><j| + |j><i|) on the canonical lattice. The shell coefficients enter the spectral-readout formulas for the five causal-wave coefficients in src/verify_coefficient_readout.py. Values come from the IR-hyperbolicity certificate of Section~3 of the manuscript and are tested in tests/test_ir_hyperbolicity.py.
shell_weight_normalisation: geometric-decay with ratio 1/2 by retarded-shell index
